title: About Me
story: I build practical software systems focused on backend development, APIs, real-time features, and workflow-driven applications.
My experience comes from working on backend-heavy products where maintainability, reliability, and clean system structure were important.
I enjoy solving real operational and product problems by building simple and scalable solutions that work well in real-world usage.
I have worked on SaaS platforms, authentication systems, payment workflows, and full-stack applications using Node.js, NestJS, React.js, and MongoDB.
I prefer practical development, clear architecture, and maintainable systems over unnecessary complexity.
highlights: Experience with SaaS and real-time applications
